description: Happy path: completed project with base aesthetic and target personas returns 2 to 3 variants with swap suggestions

input.project_title: Vintage Arched Mirror Makeover with Aged Gold Frame

expect.variants[].aesthetic_name: present, short label for the variant mood
expect.variants[].key_changes[].item: present, names the element being swapped
expect.variants[].persona_fit: present, references at least one of the provided target personas

prohibit: specific brand names in swap descriptions

description: Minimal inputs: project and base aesthetic only, atom selects personas from brand roster

input.project_title: Dark Chalk-Painted Bookshelf with Thrifted Brass Objects

expect.variants[].persona_fit: present, atom selects best-fit personas when none provided

description: Edge case: project where a swap cannot be determined without fabricating sourcing data results in null field and flag

expect.variants[].key_changes[].swap_descriptio: uses descriptive language, not fabricated sourcing or availability claims
expect.notes: present when any field could not be determined without fabrication, flags the limitation
